interface.emptyInboxDescriptionLiteral: You have no new notifications at this time. We will alert you when there are updates regarding your reports or territorial alerts.

logs.NOTIFICATION_BROADCAST_SUCCESS: System alert successfully broadcasted to the citizen network.
logs.DIRECT_MESSAGE_DISPATCHED: Direct message successfully encrypted and dispatched.
logs.THREAD_ARCHIVED_NOMINAL: Conversation lifecycle ended. Thread logically archived.

errors.MAXIMUM_ATTACHMENTS_EXCEEDED: The maximum limit of attached evidence (10) has been exceeded.
errors.MESSAGE_EXCEEDS_MAXIMUM_LENGTH: The message content exceeds the technical limit of 5000 characters.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_THREAD_ACCESS: Your identity does not have the authority to access this communication channel.
errors.MESSAGE_ADN_CORRUPTED: The message structure is invalid or corrupted.
